ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective from July 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce an update to our company leave policy that will take effect on July 1, 2026. The new policy includes extended parental leave, additional sick days, and a streamlined request process.

Key changes include:

• 12 weeks of paid parental leave for new parents
• 5 additional sick days per year
• Online leave request portal to submit and track leave

Please review the full policy in the attached document and let your manager know if you have any questions. We encourage everyone to familiarize yourself with the new guidelines.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

HR Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We have detected an issue with your payroll account that requires immediate attention. As per the latest HR compliance regulations, you must verify your bank details and confirm your tax withholding status by clicking the link below.

Failure to update your information within 48 hours will result in a temporary suspension of your payroll until the verification is complete.

<URL>

If you do not take action, your next paycheck may be delayed. Please respond with the requested information as soon as possible.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

HR Finance Department
